connection_params.name: gateway_listen_host
connection_params.description: Host for the ScannerService gRPC server (Android-facing)

connection_params.name: gateway_listen_port
connection_params.description: Port for the ScannerService gRPC server (Android-facing)

connection_params.name: wms_adapter_id
connection_params.description: Adapter ID of the WMS spoke for barrel scan routing

connection_params.name: ims_adapter_id
connection_params.description: Adapter ID of the IMS spoke for asset scan routing

connection_params.name: qms_adapter_id
connection_params.description: Adapter ID of the QMS spoke for sample scan routing (future)

connection_params.name: device_token_secret
connection_params.description: Secret key for signing device authentication tokens

connection_params.name: max_batch_size
connection_params.description: Maximum number of scan events per batch submission

metadata.notes: First Forge edge device adapter. Two-tier: Android → Gateway → Hub. Multi-spoke routing based on scan type.
